title: Home - Visit Pioneer Square - Seattle, WA Visit Pioneer Square – Seattle, WA
content: ## explore **pioneer square**. Welcome to the Original Seattle Neighborhood – rich in history, arts, culture, and food! # this is **pioneer square**. # Welcome to **PIONEER SQUARE**. Lumen Field is a world-class multi-purpose stadium located on the southern edge of Pioneer Square, serving as the high-energy home for the Seattle Seahawks and Sounders FC while offering breathtaking views of the city skyline. Relax, enjoy a lunch break, or read a book at Occidental Park – a public park at the heart of Pioneer Square. Klondike Gold Rush National Historical Park is a free urban national park located in the historic Cadillac Hotel building that preserves the story of the stampede to the Yukon gold fields and Seattle’s crucial role in this event. ### **Pioneer Park**. At the heart of Seattle’s historical district,  the land from which Seattle’s industrial base grew, Pioneer Park is a small park that offers the perfect destination to experience Seattle’s early history.

title: Pioneer Square - Visit Seattle
content: **Pioneer Square Pergola** Photo Jorge Garrido. # Pioneer Square. ## Seattle’s original downtown blends legendary history and architecture with creative and contemporary retailers and restaurants. A tree-lined street with brick pavement in the Pioneer Square neighborhood, bordered by historic buildings. This colorful neighborhood’s dynamic history comes alive on engaging walks with **Bill Speidel’s Underground Tour**, which pass through hidden tunnels and subterranean remnants of Seattle’s original downtown. Up above, **Smith Tower** stands tall as the city’s original skyscraper, with its dramatic 35th-floor observation deck. **Waterfall Garden Park** offers a quiet escape with its 22-foot manmade waterfall and **Pioneer Square Habitat Beach** delivers a dose of serenity with open views of Elliott Bay. Or opt for high-energy fun at **Flatstick Pub**, with indoor mini golf and other diversions. At the new Populus Seattle hotel, sip cocktails at the hip rooftop **Firn Bar** and settle in for a meal of hearth-inspired open-flame and smoked contemporary fare at rustic-chic Salt Harvest Restaurant (populusseattle.com).
